name: GEOSPACE TECHNOLOGIES CORP
summary: Geospace Technologies Corporation designs and manufactures technology solutions across three segments: Smart Water, Energy Solutions, and Intelligent Industrial. Products include Hydroconn smart water connector cables, Aquana remote shutoff valves, wireless seismic data acquisition systems (Pioneer, OBX, Mariner), OptoSeis fiber optic sensing, SADAR border/perimeter security systems, Heartbeat Detector technology, imaging products, and specialized contract manufacturing services. The company serves water utilities, oil and gas, defense, and industrial markets.
